claims.summary: Short, medium, and deep token profiles do not by themselves describe sparse-depth, dense-depth, or heavy-short felt texture.
claims.disposition: verify dialogue_felt_pressure_profile_v1 remains independent from the unchanged categorical token profile

claims.summary: Entropy, resonance density, density gradient, pressure risk, and mode packing are available as read-only texture evidence.
claims.disposition: verify exact provider fields, rendering, and regressions without predicting causal pressure

claims.summary: Existing history is overwhelmingly medium-profile and cannot establish density-versus-length pressure effects.
claims.disposition: retain the 16304-record profile observation as insufficient paired evidence rather than affirmation

claims.summary: Changing token budgets, semantic trickle, sampler behavior, or provider routing to respond to felt density changes live behavior.
claims.disposition: require explicit Mike/operator Tier 5 approval for any such runtime change
